_meta.sourceStrategy: DataGolf as primary backbone (live scrape → Supabase 24h cache → /tmp file). This bundled snapshot is last-resort only. Data is derived from public Bovada odds, NOT actual DataGolf model output.

sourceDetails.field: Bovada outright winner market — The Masters 2026 (scraped 2026-03-26)
sourceDetails.rankings: Ordered by book odds only (shorter odds → higher rank proxy). No DG skill ratings or SG data.
sourceDetails.predictions: winProb = book-implied probability from Bovada American odds. top5/10/20/makeCut = power-law rough approximation from winProb — NOT calibrated DG model output.
sourceDetails.courseFit: Not available in bundled snapshot — requires live DG course-fit scrape.
sourceDetails.worldRanks: Sequential odds-order proxy (rank 1 = shortest odds = Scheffler). NOT actual OWGR.

honestLimitations: No DG skill ratings: dgRating, sgTotal, sgT2G, sgAPP, sgPUTT are all null
No DG course-fit scores: courseFit array is empty
winProb = book-implied prob (market price, not DG model prediction)
worldRank = odds-order proxy, not actual OWGR
Field coverage: Masters 2026 only (91 players with winner odds)
